instruction: Customer: 'My order has not arrived and tracking has not updated for 5 days.'
response: I am sorry for the delay. I can open a carrier trace now and share an update within 24 hours. If needed, we can also issue a replacement or refund.

instruction: Customer: 'How do I reset my password?'
response: Select 'Forgot password' on the sign-in page, enter your account email, and follow the reset link. If the email does not arrive, check spam or contact support.

instruction: Customer: 'I was charged twice for one subscription.'
response: Thanks for flagging this. I will review the billing records and reverse any duplicate charge. You will receive a confirmation once the adjustment is complete.
